description: issue #331: with the educational profile NOT active (core-language only), `explain` is not a recognized command — the reader still parses it as a bare zero-argument Call (the profile-legality decision belongs to check(), not the reader — mirroring how a Turtle & Rendering primitive like `forward` behaves when turtle-rendering is inactive, spec/tooling.md:175-176), so `check()` raises ol-unknown-command with no did-you-mean candidate.

diagnostics.message: i don't know how to explain. check the spelling, or define it with 'define'.
